metadata.title: Carry-Forward
metadata.description: An Obsidian Notes plugin for generating and copying block IDs and for copying lines with links to the copied line.

regex.source: Notice("Copied")
regex.target: Notice("已复制")

regex.source: .log("loading carry-forward-line plugin")
regex.target: .log("正在加载前向引用插件")

regex.source: .log("unloading carry-forward-line plugin")
regex.target: .log("正在卸载前向引用插件")

regex.source: name: "Copy selection with each line linked to its copied source (default link text)"
regex.target: name: "复制选中内容（每行添加源链接｜默认文本）"

regex.source: name: "Copy selection with first line linked to its copied source (default link text)"
regex.target: name: "复制选中内容（首行添加源链接｜默认文本）"

regex.source: name: "Copy link to line (default link text)"
regex.target: name: "复制行链接（默认文本）"

regex.source: name: "Copy embed link to line (default link text)"
regex.target: name: "复制行嵌入链接（默认文本）"

regex.source: name: "Copy selection with each line linked to its copied source (link text from selection)"
regex.target: name: "复制选中内容（每行添加源链接｜使用选中文本）"

regex.source: name: "Copy selection with first line linked to its copied source (link text from selection)"
regex.target: name: "复制选中内容（首行添加源链接｜使用选中文本）"

regex.source: name: "Copy link to line (link text from selection)"
regex.target: name: "复制行链接（使用选中文本）"

regex.source: name: "Copy embed link to line (link text from selection)"
regex.target: name: "复制行嵌入链接（使用选中文本）"

regex.source: name: "Copy selection with each line linked to its copied source (link text from clipboard)"
regex.target: name: "复制选中内容（每行添加源链接｜使用剪贴板文本）"

regex.source: name: "Copy selection with first line linked to its copied source (link text from clipboard)"
regex.target: name: "复制选中内容（首行添加源链接｜使用剪贴板文本）"

regex.source: name: "Copy link to line (link text from clipboard)"
regex.target: name: "复制行链接（使用剪贴板文本）"

regex.source: name: "Copy embed link to line (link text from clipboard)"
regex.target: name: "复制行嵌入链接（使用剪贴板文本）"

regex.source: text: "Carry-forward"
regex.target: text: "前向引用"

regex.source: text: "Copied references"
regex.target: text: "已复制引用"

regex.source: text: 'Settings relating to "Copy link to line..." and "Copy embed link to line..." commands.'
regex.target: text: '“复制行链接”与“复制行嵌入链接”相关设置'

regex.source: text: "Copied lines"
regex.target: text: "已复制行"

regex.source: text: 'Settings relating to "Copy selection..." commands.'
regex.target: text: '“复制选中内容”相关设置'

regex.source: .setName("Default link text")
regex.target: .setName("默认链接文本")

regex.source: .setName("Copied references")
regex.target: .setName("引用模板")

regex.source: .setName("From")
regex.target: .setName("匹配模式")

regex.source: .setName("To")
regex.target: .setName("替换模板")

regex.source: .setName("Remove leading whitespace from first line")
regex.target: .setName("删除首行缩进")

regex.source: .setName("Notify on successful copy")
regex.target: .setName("复制成功提示")

regex.source: .setDesc('The default text that "{{LINK}}" in the settings below will be replaced with. Leaving this blank will display the actual text of the link.')
regex.target: .setDesc('下方设置中 {{LINK}} 的默认替换文本，留空则显示实际链接文本')

regex.source: .setDesc("The full text of copied references. Use {{LINK}} to place the link.")
regex.target: .setDesc("引用模板格式，使用 {{LINK}} 插入链接")

regex.source: .setDesc("Find the first match of a Regular Expression in each copied line")
regex.target: .setDesc("在每行使用正则表达式进行首次匹配")

regex.source: .setDesc("Replace the first match in each copied line with text. Use {{LINK}} to place the link.")
regex.target: .setDesc("替换每行的首次匹配内容，使用 {{LINK}} 插入链接")

regex.source: .setDesc("When copying a line without having selected a specific part of that line, remove any whitespace at the beginning of the copied line.")
regex.target: .setDesc("复制整行时自动删除行首空白")

regex.source: .setDesc('Display a "Copied" notice upon successfully copying text to the clipboard.')
regex.target: .setDesc('复制成功后显示提示通知')
